All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Serialized Form

R

remove(String, String) - Method in class DataAccessLayer.DataStorage
Removes a specific circuit from a project in the database.
remove(String, String) - Method in interface DataAccessLayer.Storage
Removes a specific circuit from a project in storage.
removeCircuit(String, String) - Method in class BusinessLayer.Project
Deletes a circuit from a project in storage.
removeComponent(Component) - Method in class BusinessLayer.Circuit
Removes a component from the circuit.
removeConnector(Connector) - Method in class BusinessLayer.Circuit
Removes a connector (wire) from the circuit.
removeWire(Connector) - Method in class BusinessLayer.Pin
Removes a connector (wire) from this pin.
renderComponent(Component) - Method in class BusinessLayer.ExportService
Renders the given Swing component into a BufferedImage.
reset() - Method in class BusinessLayer.Circuit
Resets all component and connector values and clears connections.
resetPorjects() - Method in class DataAccessLayer.DataStorage
Resets all projects in the database by truncating the "components" and "connectors" tables.
resetPorjects() - Method in interface DataAccessLayer.Storage
Resets all projects in the storage.
